hooks.command: command -v magus >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; exec magus agent hook --from-json tool_input.command -o 'template={{if eq .decision "deny"}}{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":{{toJson .reason}}}}{{else if eq .decision "advise"}}{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":{{toJson .context}}}}{{end}}'
